title: Switory 24 Pcs Gift Bags with Ribbon, Dark Blue Paper Bag with Twist Handles for Mens, Small Kraft Party Bags for Valentines, Kids Party, Birthday, Wedding, Baby Shower, Retail (21X15X8cm)
features: 【Eco-friendly Paper Bags】 - These paper bags measure 21X15X8cm, made of premium 100% recyclable paper. They are environment-friendly and durable. Our paper bags are recyclable, compostable, and a great alternative to plastic bags.

【Gift Bags with Ribbon】 - Each paper bag comes with a ribbon, can be used as small gift bags, welcome bags, party bags, shopping bags, retail bags, merchandise bags or food service takeout bags. They are great gift bags for party, wedding, baby shower, birthday, anniversary, festival, graduation, etc. Paper bags with handles also are a popular choice among many retailers.

【DIY Craft Bag】 - These paper gift bags are originally plain and unadorned in appearance, you could decorate these kraft gift bags with drawing, colouring, flowers, paper cut-outs, buttons, sequins, ribbons, etcs. For different holidays, you could staple business card or stamp the outside of the paper bags.

【Sturdy & Durable Party Bags 】- Our paper party bags are thicker and more durable than normal bags and are not easy to tear. The well-constructed paper twist handle is strong, and the handle is firmly attached to the paper bag easy to carry. The reinforced bottom also provides extra support while you carry items, ensuring that the contents will stay safe not fall through.
【Customer Satisfaction Guaranteen】Your happiness is our priority. ​If our gift bags do not meet your expectations, please feel free to contact us. Switory wishing you happy every day!
